name: I Don't Have Time
src: 1. I Don't Have Time - Hoodie - princ.png
description: "I don't have time to convince you." Satoshi's words weren't just a brush-off — they were a stance. A reminder to walk your path, with or without applause. Conviction without compromise. Creation without permission. You believe. You build. And with Orange Peel, you wear it.

name: Goku Young Holder
description: Little Goku stands tall on the Bitcoin symbol, power pole in hand, ready for whatever comes next. Innocence meets conviction. He doesn't need to understand the whole system — he just knows it's worth defending. For the young at heart who hold the line with a smile.

name: Goku Young Holder
description: Little Goku stands tall on the Bitcoin symbol, power pole in hand, ready for whatever comes next. Innocence meets conviction. He doesn't need to understand the whole system — he just knows it's worth defending. For the young at heart who hold the line with a smile.

name: Knock Know Neo
description: "Knock, knock, Neo." The screen flickers. The message appears. The choice is made. Bitcoin is the red pill — visible, undeniable, unapologetic. This design doesn't whisper. It declares. For those who chose to wake up and aren't afraid to show it.

name: Knock Know Neo
description: "Knock, knock, Neo." The screen flickers. The message appears. The choice is made. Bitcoin is the red pill — visible, undeniable, unapologetic. This design doesn't whisper. It declares. For those who chose to wake up and aren't afraid to show it.

name: Down The Rabbit Hole
src: 12. Down The Rabbit Hole - Hoodie - princ.png
description: "Down the rabbit hole I fell, learning things they'll never tell." A tribute to "Bitcoin is Defiance" by The Crypto Couple. The rabbit hole swallowed you whole — and what you found changed everything. Money was broken. Eyes were opened by the flash of an orange light. No logo, no label — just a nod to the song, the awakening, and everyone who dared.

name: Follow The Rabbit
description: The white rabbit doesn't wait. It runs. You follow. Through the looking glass, past the noise, beyond the veil of fiat illusion. Bitcoin is the rabbit hole — and this design is your badge of passage. Bold, visible, unmistakable. You followed the rabbit. You found the truth.

name: Follow The Rabbit
description: The white rabbit doesn't wait. It runs. You follow. Through the looking glass, past the noise, beyond the veil of fiat illusion. Bitcoin is the rabbit hole — and this design is your badge of passage. Bold, visible, unmistakable. You followed the rabbit. You found the truth.

name: Be The Change
description: "Be the change you want to see in the world." Gandhi's words, reborn through the lens of Bitcoin. A quiet face. Laser eyes that see further than fiat promises. No logo, no slogan — just a message for those who recognize the signal. The revolution doesn't need to shout. It just needs to begin.

name: Be The Change
description: "Be the change you want to see in the world." Gandhi's words, reborn through the lens of Bitcoin. A quiet face. Laser eyes that see further than fiat promises. No logo, no slogan — just a message for those who recognize the signal. The revolution doesn't need to shout. It just needs to begin.

name: Professional Salesman
description: A pencil-drawn portrait of Satoshi Nakamoto — the man who became famous against his will. Laser eyes on. Titled "Professional FREEDOM Salesman." No pitch. No hype. Just the greatest invention of our generation, offered quietly to anyone willing to look. This is a tribute to the anonymous architect of financial sovereignty.

name: Professional Salesman
description: A pencil-drawn portrait of Satoshi Nakamoto — the man who became famous against his will. Laser eyes on. Titled "Professional FREEDOM Salesman." No pitch. No hype. name: Sex Is Cool
description: "Sex is cool, but have you ever f*cked the system?" Provocative? Absolutely. That's the point. With the sat symbol in the background, this design speaks to Bitcoin's uncensorable nature and individual monetary sovereignty. For those who don't just question authority — they opt out entirely.

name: Chad On The Front
src: 2. Chad On The Front - Hoodie - princ.png
description: This isn't just a meme. It's your unfailing mindset. You've done the work. You didn't trust — you verified. Unshaken by FUD. Immune to hype. Locked on the long game. Laser-focused. You are a Bitcoin Chad.

name: Bitcoin Is For Women
src: 5. Bitcoin Is For Women - Hoodie - princ.png
description: Barbie was for girls. Bitcoin is for women. This design marks the shift from fantasy to financial sovereignty. It's a call to grow out of the roles we were handed — and into the power we choose.

name: Majin Maximalist
description: You embrace your convictions — your maxi side. Some might even call you toxic. As if that were an insult! Like the Majin mark — stripped of fake kindness and hollow consensus — it unleashes. You're not here to educate. Not here to please. You're here to defend Bitcoin's integrity. Against dilution. Against co-option. Against noise. Toxic? Maxi? Yes please. Wear the Majin. Unleash the Maxi.

name: Majin Maximalist

Against co-option. Against noise. Toxic? Maxi? Yes please. Wear the Majin. Unleash the Maxi.

name: Goku Four Stars
description: Young Goku on his Nimbus cloud, the four-star Dragon Ball in hand, Shenron rising behind him. A childhood icon meets generational conviction. Pure-hearted, unstoppable, ready to change the world — sound familiar? For the ones who grew up dreaming and found their fight in Bitcoin.
